notes: PC2 retry after login. Cross-env asymmetry confirmed: cohere (HTTPS REST API to dashboard.cohere.com/playground) IS intercepted on PC2; character.ai (WSS) and copilot.microsoft.com (WSS) are NOT intercepted on PC2. Hypothesis: PC2 IS behind the Etap APF bridge for HTTP/REST traffic but WSS framing not parsed (mirrors prev #893 'WSS envelope' diagnosis on PC1 for copilot). 897 result here validates that V2 schema works on PC2 for at least the REST path — V2 schema cross-env dispatch achieves mission for this service. Browser automation via Claude_in_Chrome substitute.
